title: Handle possible asprintf failure in rootless_linux.c
body:
If `asprintf` fails we early exit now.

I hope I got to follow the current code style, we may add a clang-format configuration to this, WDYT?

comments.body: I added some more verbose logging to `stderr`. I hope this breaks not anything.
